intro: The residential and logistics sectors were among the most impacted by a series of IoT vulnerabilities reported in April 2026. The eight articles in this archive detail threats including the critical flaws CVE-2026-22898 and CVE-2026-4682, both with a CVSS of 8.8, alongside CVE-2026-5057. The coverage, spanning just four days, reflects a severity mix of two critical, three high, and three medium vulnerabilities. Affected sectors also included individuals, telecommunications, and transportation, highlighting the broad attack surface of connected devices.
